apps.name: Lumen Notes
apps.summary: A full personal notes workspace with search, tags, import, and export.
apps.description: Lumen Notes is a full desktop notes app with persistent local storage, quick searching across titles and content, tag editing, auto-save, and file import/export workflows.
features: Create, duplicate, and delete notes
Tag system and instant full-text filtering
Autosave editor with word and character counters
Import text files and export selected notes

apps.name: Orbit Tasks
apps.summary: A kanban-style planner with priorities, due dates, and board movement.
apps.description: Orbit Tasks provides a three-column workflow board, detailed task editor, priority and due date fields, and saved board state for ongoing project tracking.
features: Kanban board with To Do / In Progress / Done lanes
Priority and due date fields
Quick move left/right between workflow stages
Search across task title and details

apps.name: Media Lab
apps.summary: A full ffmpeg conversion studio for video, audio, and GIF output.
apps.description: Media Lab wraps ffmpeg in a GUI with presets, optional clip trimming, live conversion log output, conversion progress tracking, and quick access to output folders.
features: Presets for MP4, WebM, MP3, and GIF
Optional start time and duration clipping
Live log and progress indicator
Stop conversion and open output folder controls

apps.name: Focus Ring
apps.summary: A focused work timer with break modes and local session history.
apps.description: Focus Ring is a compact Pomodoro-style timer for CRIXA with focus, short break, and long break modes, adjustable durations, audible completion, and a saved history of recent sessions.
features: Focus, short break, and long break modes
Adjustable session length from one to 120 minutes
Recent session history saved locally
Pause, reset, and completion alert controls

apps.name: Prism Calc
apps.summary: A calculator and unit converter for everyday desktop work.
apps.description: Prism Calc combines a scientific expression calculator with quick converters for length, mass, and data units. It is useful for small calculations without opening a browser.
features: Expression calculator with common math functions
Length, mass, and data conversion presets
Keyboard-friendly expression field
Clear result and conversion output areas

apps.name: Color Forge
apps.summary: A palette generator for UI themes, CSS variables, and quick color exploration.
apps.description: Color Forge lets you pick a base color, generate a coordinated palette, inspect readable swatches, and copy the result as CSS custom properties.
features: Base color picker with generated tonal variants
Readable swatches with hex values
CSS custom property export
Clipboard copy for theme work

apps.name: Snippet Vault
apps.summary: A searchable local library for commands, code snippets, and reusable text.
apps.description: Snippet Vault stores titled snippets with tags and body text in local JSON, supports quick search, and copies selected snippets to the clipboard.
features: Create, edit, delete, and tag snippets
Instant search across titles, tags, and body text
Copy snippet body to clipboard
Local JSON storage in the user's data directory

apps.name: Log Lens
apps.summary: A readable log viewer with open, reload, and fast filtering controls.
apps.description: Log Lens opens common Linux logs when available, supports loading arbitrary log files, and filters large recent log windows without needing a terminal.
features: Open common system logs automatically when present
Load arbitrary log files through a file picker
Filter log lines as you type
Reload the current log while investigating issues

apps.name: Archive Studio
apps.summary: Create ZIP/TAR.GZ archives and extract common archive formats.
apps.description: Archive Studio provides a simple GUI for selecting files or folders, producing compressed ZIP or TAR.GZ archives, and extracting archives to a selected destination.
features: Add individual files or whole folders
Create ZIP archives with deflate compression
Create TAR.GZ archives for Linux-friendly bundles
Extract ZIP and TAR-compatible archives
